description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The type of advisory this is PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.data_format The format of the advisory, such as MITRE
outputs.name: PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.data_type

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE described by this advisory PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cve_date_public The date this CVE was released
outputs.name: PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cve_id

outputs.description: The name of this CVE PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.description Human readable description of Advisory
outputs.name: PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cve_title

outputs.description: The CVSS Score PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cvss_severity The CVSS Severity
outputs.name: PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cvss_score

outputs.description: The CVSS Vector string PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.affected_version_list List of affected versions strings
outputs.name: PANSecurityAdvisory.Advisory.cvss_vector_string
